title: BlockRevive
description: A LightPaper weight plugin to regenerate any blocks in any region you make.
body:
# **BlockRevive** - Advanced Block Regeneration Plugin

BlockRevive is a powerful and feature-rich Minecraft plugin for Paper servers that enables automatic block regeneration in designated regions. Perfect for mining servers, resource worlds, and custom game modes where you want blocks to respawn after being mined.

**Supported Versions:**
The recommended versions are currently 1.21 to 1.21.10,
Other Minecraft versions may work, but they haven't been tested.

## 🌟 Key Features
- **Region-Based Regeneration System** - Define custom 3D regions where blocks automatically regenerate after being broken
- **Full Nexo Integration** - Complete support for Nexo custom blocks with proper ID detection and regeneration
- **WorldEdit Schematic Support** - Paste schematics and automatically create regeneration regions
- **Visual Selection Tool** - Easy-to-use enchanted blaze rod wand for selecting regions (left/right click to set positions)
- **Particle Boundaries** - Visualize region boundaries with orange particle outlines
- **Customizable Regeneration Times** - Set different regeneration times per block type, per region, or globally
- **Centralized Holograms** - Display all regenerating blocks in a single paginated hologram per region
- **Individual Block Holograms** - Optional countdown timers above each regenerating block (toggleable)
- **Look-Based Hologram Display** - Holograms appear only when looking at regenerating blocks (reduces clutter)
- **Flexible Drop Control** - Configure whether blocks drop items and experience
- **Particle Effects** - Customizable particles for breaking, regenerating, and bedrock states
- **Sound Effects** - Optional sound notifications when blocks regenerate
- **Permission System** - Control who can bypass regeneration mechanics
- **Region Groups** - Organize multiple regions into groups for easier management
- **Per-Region Configuration** - Each region gets its own config file for granular control
- **Auto-Save System** - Automatic data saving to prevent loss on server crashes
- **Block Placement Prevention** - Optionally prevent players from placing blocks in regeneration regions
- **Full Tab Completion** - Complete command and argument auto-completion
- **Debug Mode** - Built-in toggleable debug logging for troubleshooting
- **WorldGuard Compatibility** - Works alongside WorldGuard for region protection


## 📋 Requirements
- Minecraft: 1.21+ (Paper recommended)
- Java: 21+
- Optional: Nexo (for custom block support)
- Optional: WorldEdit or FastAsyncWorldEdit (for schematic features)
- Optional: WorldGuard (for region protection compatibility)

## 🎮 Use Cases
- **Mining Servers** - Create renewable ore farms and mining worlds
- **Resource Worlds** - Allow infinite resource gathering without world regeneration
- **Custom RPG Worlds** - Renewable resource nodes for progression systems
- **Prison Servers** - Automated mine resets without manual intervention

## ⚡ Performance & Technical
- Efficient region management with optimized block tracking
- Async block regeneration to prevent server lag
- Smart caching system for block types and regeneration data
- Auto-save intervals to preserve data during crashes
- Supports unlimited regions and regenerating blocks

## 🔧 Easy Setup
- Drop the JAR into your plugins folder
- Restart the server
- Use /blockrevive wand to get the selection tool
- Select your region and use /blockrevive create <name>
- Configure block times in the region's config file
- Done! Blocks will now regenerate automatically

## 📦 Commands Overview
- Region creation and management
- Block-specific regeneration time configuration
- Schematic pasting with auto-region creation
- Region visualization and inspection
- Hologram positioning and management
- Region grouping for batch operations
- Manual save and reload functions

## 🛡️ Permissions
- blockrevive.admin - Full access to all commands and features
- blockrevive.bypass - Break blocks normally without regeneration
- blockrevive.region.<region> - Allow Player to mine in certain regions

## 📝 Version Information
- Plugin Name: BlockRevive
- Author: Turretedash7
